metadata.name: Adaptive Traffic Signal Control for Congestion

description: An operator needs to respond to a sudden traffic jam on a major arterial road by adjusting traffic signal timing.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge an alert for unusually high traffic volume on 'Main Street Corridor'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the congested area from the traffic monitoring system.

nodes.task_description: Analyze real-time traffic flow and queue length data for the affected intersections.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms a bottleneck at the intersection of Main St and 5th Ave.

nodes.task_description: Activate the 'Congestion Relief' signal timing plan for the affected corridor to prioritize flow on Main Street.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully applies the new timing plan to the traffic signals.
